message:
🌱 Add wasmcloud: [RFC] Secrets in wasmCloud mission (#789)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "wasmcloud-2190-rfc-secrets-in-wasmcloud",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "wasmcloud: [RFC] Secrets in wasmCloud",
+    "description": "[RFC] Secrets in wasmCloud. Requested by 7+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current wasmcloud deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your wasmcloud version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n wasmcloud -l app.kubernetes.io/name=wasmcloud\nhelm list -n wasmcloud 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working wasmcloud installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review wasmcloud configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant wasmcloud configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n wasmcloud -l app.kubernetes.io/name=wasmcloud\nkubectl get configmap -n wasmcloud -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=wasmcloud\n```\n### RFC Title\n\nRFC: Secrets in wasmCloud\n\n### Introduction\n\nThe goal of this RFC is to propose a new API specification for *secrets backends*, which are programs that will listen on NATS for requests for secrets and be able to satisfy them."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [RFC] Secrets in wasmCloud",
+        "description": "## Feature or Problem\n\nThis commit adds a SQL database provider that supports the widely used, featureful Postgres database system.\n\nOne of Postgres's main benefits is a robust type system, and part of the work to make Postges possible to use from the wasmCloud ecosystem involves representing that robust type system in WIT -- see `bindings.rs` for more details.\n\nThis provider introduces multiple interfaces for making queries to Postgres cluster -- managed, named profile driven, and completely\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n wasmcloud -l app.kubernetes.io/name=wasmcloud\nkubectl get events -n wasmcloud --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[RFC] Secrets in wasmCloud\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Feature or Problem\n\nThis commit adds a SQL database provider that supports the widely used, featureful Postgres database system.\n\nOne of Postgres's main benefits is a robust type system, and part of the work to make Postges possible to use from the wasmCloud ecosystem involves representing that robust type system in WIT -- see `bindings.rs` for more details.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "wasmcloud",
+      "incubating",
+      "runtime",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+    ],

+      "Deployment",

+      "Namespace"
+    ],

+    ],

+    },
